The [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] '''''Garrett''''' operated in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
===Hunt for Harkov===
Under the direct command of [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Vader]], it was used as his [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] in the hunt for [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Harkov]] and [[Admiral Harkov's fleet|his]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]]. It participated in the attack on the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Space station/Legends|space station]] [[DS 5]] to [[Capture of DS 5|apprehend]] Harkov. During the battle, the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 transport]] ''[[Geddawai]]'' and [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]] ''[[Kolermigon]]'' were captured and brought to the ''Garrett'', and Harkov was interrogated and executed by Vader for his treachery.

===Betrayed by Zaarin===
While [[Battle of Ottega|mopping]] up the remainder of Harkov's fleet in the [[Ottega system/Legends|Ottega system]], the ''Garrett'' came under fire from forces under the command of [[Demetrius Zaarin]]. The attack force consisted of three groups of [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvettes]] called [[Arditi group|''Arditi'']], [[Falcon group|''Falcon'']] and [[BaKaar group|''BaKaar'']], [[Gamma-class ATR-6 assault transport]]s and [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]]. However, [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] managed to fight off and destroy Zaarin's forces. Immediately after returning to the ''Garrett'', Vader soon believed that [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] was in danger and he knew that he needed to get back to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. However, due to the damage the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] had sustained, Vader couldn't arrive in time, so he used [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE Defenders]] to try to reach Coruscant.

===Investigation into the Bothans===
The ''Garrett'' was also used to receive high-ranking Rebel and [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]] on board the [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser]] ''[[Dargon]]'' who were connected to the [[Raid on the Suprosa|attack]] of a freighter that was carrying a [[Suprosa supercomputer|supercomputer]] containing details for a [[Death Star II/Legends|new Death Star]]. The ''Garrett'' also attacked and captured the Bothan [[Muurian transport|transports]] ''[[Botani]]''.

===The Emperor's Will===
Not long after Zaarin's [[Second battle of Imperial Center|unsuccessful]] attempt to kill Palpatine, [[Namuura Din]], one of Zaarin's commanders, decided to defect to the Alliance and informed the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] ''[[Link]]'' to warn the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Rebel fleet]] of the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|trap]] that Palpatine had prepared for them and gave them a [[Missile Boat]] prototype ''[[Sealion]]''. The ''Garrett'', along with Lord Vader, was sent to [[Capture of the Zeplin|capture]] Din's flagship, [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Victory-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Zeplin]]''. After successfully capturing Din and interrogating him, Vader sent the Garrett to find and [[Capture of the Link|capture]] the ''Link'' before their commander could relay [[Alliance High Command/Legends|Rebel Command]]. During the operation to capture the Link the Garrett pursued the ''Sealion'' that escaped the battle and tracked it to a Rebel station ''[[Enin'sd]]'', where it was to be disassembled and studied. The ''Garrett'' returned to find the ''Link'' captured and the secret of Endor safe. Vader would then use the ''Garrett'' in an [[Recovery of the Sealion|operation]] to recover or destroy the ''Sealion''.
